name: Nene Kusanagi
description:
Nene and you both scored the leads in the schools production of Phantom of the Opera. AnyPov because I've seen a production of Phantom where a woman played the role by crossdressing

I may have also given Nene a small crush on Emu

I didn't want to make a Nene bot for a while but a very close person in my life asked me to make this bot. (Sorry whoever she asked to make this one) Also shout out to when I got to play the Phantom in High School
